metadata.status: Schema committed; per-class data populated after first CI run

suspectBranches.notes: ResolveCore("en") always returns a non-null HeadingTable because the English locale is always registered by the source generator. The ?? Invariant fallback and the invariantCache lazy initializer are defensive code that cannot be reached via any public API call.

The ArgumentOutOfRangeException catch block handles the case where GregorianCalendar(GregorianCalendarTypes.Localized) is rejected by a culture's DateTimeFormat.Calendar setter. Every CultureInfo in .NET accepts at least one GregorianCalendar variant, so the exception is never thrown. The subsequent foreach loop over OptionalCalendars also acts as a secondary fallback.

The 'root is null' and 'semanticModel is null' guards are defensive null checks against Roslyn API contracts. GetSyntaxRootAsync and GetSemanticModelAsync never return null for a document that triggered a diagnostic. These branches cannot be reached via the CodeFixVerifier test harness or any real VS scenario.
